title: crash when accessing aggregate type parameters within interfaces

features.name: interface with struct type parameter
features.description: Code should include an interface definition with a struct type parameter
features.snippet:
typedef struct { int BAR_INT; bit BAR_BIT; byte BAR_ARRAY [0:3]; } foo_t;
interface intf #(parameter foo_t FOO = '{4, 1'b1, '{8'd1, 8'd2, 8'd4, 8'd8}}) (input wire clk); modport modp (input clk); endinterface

features.name: interface array port with aggregate parameter access
features.description: Code should include a module with an interface array port where the interface has an aggregate type parameter
features.snippet: module sub (intf.modp the_intf_port [4]); localparam foo_t x = the_intf_port[0].FOO; endmodule

features.name: accessing struct member from interface array parameter element
features.description: Code should include accessing a struct member from an interface array element's aggregate parameter (e.g., the_intf_port[0].FOO.BAR_INT)

features.name: accessing array element within struct from interface array parameter
features.description: Code should include accessing an array element within a struct parameter through an interface array element (e.g., the_intf_port[0].FOO.BAR_ARRAY[3])

features.name: localparam derived from interface array parameter aggregate access
features.description: Code should include a localparam assigned from a value derived by accessing parts of an aggregate parameter through an interface array element
features.snippet:
localparam int intf_foo_bar_int = the_intf_port[0].FOO.BAR_INT;
localparam byte intf_foo_bar_byte = the_intf_port[0].FOO.BAR_ARRAY[3];
